title: T-Deck: implement basic UI with LVGL or Zephyr display/input for LICHEN node status, keyboard navigation, trackball cursor
description: Update lichen/apps/puck or add UI subsys. Enable display in overlay, integrate LVGL if selected (check existing Zephyr support), map keyboard and trackball to UI events. Display LICHEN status (node ID, DODAG, battery, LoRa stats). Follow UI patterns in gateway app validation. Mandatory per epic.
